title: Science and analysis in OPSS
body: "The Office for Product Safety and Standards uses science, evidence and data to inform its decision making and shape its interventions. In this overview of our use of evidence, we hope to demonstrate both how we integrate evidence into our day-to-day work, and how we plan for research to define our future trajectory.  Our areas of expertise include:   social research data science and statistics economic analysis analysis of risk engineering technology chemistry, materials science and toxicology  "
